summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Kaelra personal AI operator. All primary bug fixes and new features verified successfully. DOUBLE-SPEAK BUG FIXED: Greeting now fires exactly once per session (1 TTS request, not 2). Dashboard properly differentiated from Home as 'Control Panel'. Natural-language commands ('show me email/calendar/jobs') work correctly. News feed functional with 11 items. No regressions detected.
passed_tests: DOUBLE-SPEAK FIX: Exactly 1 TTS request on Home initial load (not 2)
SESSION GUARD: Home -> Dashboard -> Home triggers 0 new TTS requests
DASHBOARD DIFFERENTIATION: Control panel header exists, daily briefing card removed, no composer on dashboard
NATURAL-LANGUAGE COMMANDS: 'show me email' opens KaelraSpeaks dialog (not /talk)
NATURAL-LANGUAGE COMMANDS: 'show me calendar' opens event card in KaelraSpeaks
NATURAL-LANGUAGE COMMANDS: 'show me jobs' navigates to /jobs
NATURAL-LANGUAGE COMMANDS: Normal message 'help me plan my day' navigates to /talk
NEWS FEED: News tab exists in feed tabs, 11 news items displayed
NEWS FEED: Clicking news item opens KaelraSpeaks with news card
REGRESSION: Greeting renders correctly on Home
REGRESSION: Dashboard cards render (schedule, emails, commute)
REGRESSION: Talk page loads and streams
